Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (immigration status in sentencing)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (immigration status in sentencing)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Criminal Code to provide that, in imposing a sentence on an offender who is not a Canadian citizen, a court must not take into consideration the offenderâs immigration status in Canada.
His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The Criminal Code is amended by adding the following after section 718.201:

Section.MarginalNote: Immigration status not to be considered
Section.Text: A court that imposes a sentence on an offender who is not a Canadian citizen shall not take into consideration any potential impact the sentence could have on the offenderâs immigration status in Canada, or on that of a member of their family.
